---
title: "Asankhya"
description: "Personal blog — essays, notes, and slow thinking."
comments: false
listing:
  id: ak-posts
  contents: .
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed:
    title: "Asankhya — Soma S Dhavala"
    description: "Personal essays, notes, and slow thinking."
  fields: [date, title, categories, description, reading-time]
---

::: {.subscribe}
```{=html}
<form class="mc-form" action="https://github.us2.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=5efa41ab55aaad4b221191d92&amp;id=5f51fab4af&amp;f_id=007f61e0f0" method="post" target="_blank">
  <input type="email" name="EMAIL" placeholder="Type your email…" aria-label="Email address" required>
  <div style="position:absolute;left:-5000px" aria-hidden="true"><input type="text" name="b_5efa41ab55aaad4b221191d92_5f51fab4af" tabindex="-1" value=""></div>
  <button type="submit">Subscribe</button>
</form>
<p class="mc-thanks" hidden>✓ Thanks — please check your inbox to confirm your subscription.</p>
<script>
(function(){
  var f = document.querySelector('.subscribe .mc-form');
  if (!f) return;
  // Returning from a successful submit: show the thank-you, hide the form.
  if (location.search.indexOf('subscribed=1') !== -1) {
    var t = document.querySelector('.subscribe .mc-thanks');
    f.style.display = 'none';
    if (t) t.hidden = false;
    return;
  }
  // Progressive enhancement: POST quietly to a hidden iframe, then redirect back here.
  var ifr = document.createElement('iframe');
  ifr.name = 'mc-sink'; ifr.title = 'subscribe'; ifr.tabIndex = -1; ifr.style.display = 'none';
  document.body.appendChild(ifr);
  f.target = 'mc-sink';
  var sent = false, go = function(){ if (sent) location.href = location.pathname + '?subscribed=1'; };
  f.addEventListener('submit', function(){ sent = true; setTimeout(go, 2500); }); // fallback if iframe load is missed
  ifr.addEventListener('load', go);
})();
</script>
```
:::

::: {#ak-posts}
:::
